vy-ava-√sṛj P. Ā. -sṛjati, ˚te, to throw, cast, hurl upon (gen.),  MBh. ;
to put or lay down,  ib. ;
to dismiss, send away,  ŚBr. ;
to distribute, bestow (see vy-avasarga),
to hang on, fasten to (loc.),  MBh. viii, 959  (prob. w.r. for vyava-√sañj).
